revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Newarticletext]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
ROOTPAGENAME is about subpages, so there were a bunch of false positives. Add a check for SUBJECTPAGENAME
revision.text:
{{New page DYM}}{{#switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text =
  • '''''Before creating an article, please read [[Help:Your first article]]. We recommend that new editors use the [[WP:Article wizard|Article wizard]].'''''
  • You can also [[Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for an existing article to which you can [[Help:redirect|redirect]] this title.
  • When creating an article, '''provide [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|references]]''' to [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable published sources]]. An article without references, especially a [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]], may be deleted.
  • You can also start your new article at [{{fullurl:Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit&preload=Template:Article_wizard/userpageskeleton&editintro=Wikipedia:Article_wizard/version1/Wizard-New_edit_instructions_userdraft}} Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}]. There, you can develop the article with less risk of deletion, ask other editors to help work on it, and [[Wikipedia:Moving a page|move]] it into "[[Wikipedia:What is an article?#Namespace|article space]]" when it is ready.
}} | {{ns:User talk}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''No messages''' have been posted for this user yet. {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}}{{#ifeq:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}} | {{#if: {{#invoke:IPAddress|isIp|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} | {{MediaWiki:Anontalkpagetext|caller=MediaWiki:Newarticletext}} }} }} | {{TALKSPACE}} = {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}||{{#ifexist: {{ROOTPAGENAME}}||{{Creating talk page without subject}}}}}} {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} | | Note that the corresponding {{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | subject page | article }} ''[[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}]]'' also does not exist. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}} | {{ns:File}} = {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist:Media:{{PAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = This media file is on [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]]—not on the English Wikipedia. Descriptions should be placed there. This page should rarely be used except to indicate [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|featured pictures]]. Please see the [[commons:File:{{PAGENAME}}|description page on Commons]] for file information, [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks a list of pages that use this file], or the [[{{ns:Media}}:{{PAGENAME}}|direct link to this file]]. }} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a File page with this exact title.''' Please do ''not'' manually create this page. If you wish to upload a file called ''{{PAGENAME}}'', see [[Wikipedia:Uploading images]] for instructions. If this image was recently deleted, it may still be displayed in some pages as a red link. [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks See a list of pages that display this image.] If this file previously existed, it may have been deleted locally ([{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} local deletion log]) or on Wikimedia Commons ([https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Log&type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Commons deletion log]). }} }} | {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }} }} | #default = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category = [[Help:Category|category]] | Help = [[Help:Contents|help page]] | Portal = [[Wikipedia:Portal|portal]] | Template = [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] | User = [[Wikipedia:User page|user page]] | Wikipedia = [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project page]] | #default = page }} with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} | Category = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Category}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing categories before creating this page. | Help = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Help:Contents|existing help pages]] before creating this page. | Portal = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|existing portals]] before creating this page. | Template = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Template}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing templates before creating this page. | User = In general, this page should be created and edited by [[{{ns:User}}:{{PAGENAME}}]]. | Wikipedia = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|existing policies and guidelines]] or [[Special:Search/{{ns:Project}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for similar existing project pages. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Help:Subpages]]. }}

To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.

}} }}{{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book:|nomatch= }}{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|nomatch= }}|{{fmbox|type=system|text=This page may have existed as part of the former book namespace. If so it was likely moved to [[{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|Book:|plain=False}}|^Book:|Wikipedia:Books/archive/|plain=False}}]] before being deleted. See [[Wikipedia:Books]] for more information.}}}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text:
{{New page DYM}}{{#switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text =
  • '''''Before creating an article, please read [[Help:Your first article]]. We recommend that new editors use the [[WP:Article wizard|Article wizard]].'''''
  • You can also [[Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for an existing article to which you can [[Help:redirect|redirect]] this title.
  • When creating an article, '''provide [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|references]]''' to [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable published sources]]. An article without references, especially a [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]], may be deleted.
  • You can also start your new article at [{{fullurl:Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit&preload=Template:Article_wizard/userpageskeleton&editintro=Wikipedia:Article_wizard/version1/Wizard-New_edit_instructions_userdraft}} Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}]. There, you can develop the article with less risk of deletion, ask other editors to help work on it, and [[Wikipedia:Moving a page|move]] it into "[[Wikipedia:What is an article?#Namespace|article space]]" when it is ready.
}} | {{ns:User talk}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''No messages''' have been posted for this user yet. {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}}{{#ifeq:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}} | {{#if: {{#invoke:IPAddress|isIp|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} | {{MediaWiki:Anontalkpagetext|caller=MediaWiki:Newarticletext}} }} }} | {{TALKSPACE}} = {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}||{{#ifexist: {{ROOTPAGENAME}}||{{Creating talk page without subject}}}}}} {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} | | Note that the corresponding {{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | subject page | article }} ''[[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}]]'' also does not exist. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}} | {{ns:File}} = {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist:Media:{{PAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = This media file is on [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]]—not on the English Wikipedia. Descriptions should be placed there. This page should rarely be used except to indicate [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|featured pictures]]. Please see the [[commons:File:{{PAGENAME}}|description page on Commons]] for file information, [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks a list of pages that use this file], or the [[{{ns:Media}}:{{PAGENAME}}|direct link to this file]]. }} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a File page with this exact title.''' Please do ''not'' manually create this page. If you wish to upload a file called ''{{PAGENAME}}'', see [[Wikipedia:Uploading images]] for instructions. If this image was recently deleted, it may still be displayed in some pages as a red link. [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks See a list of pages that display this image.] If this file previously existed, it may have been deleted locally ([{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} local deletion log]) or on Wikimedia Commons ([https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Log&type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Commons deletion log]). }} }} | {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }} }} | #default = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category = [[Help:Category|category]] | Help = [[Help:Contents|help page]] | Portal = [[Wikipedia:Portal|portal]] | Template = [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] | User = [[Wikipedia:User page|user page]] | Wikipedia = [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project page]] | #default = page }} with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} | Category = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Category}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing categories before creating this page. | Help = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Help:Contents|existing help pages]] before creating this page. | Portal = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|existing portals]] before creating this page. | Template = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Template}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing templates before creating this page. | User = In general, this page should be created and edited by [[{{ns:User}}:{{PAGENAME}}]]. | Wikipedia = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|existing policies and guidelines]] or [[Special:Search/{{ns:Project}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for similar existing project pages. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Help:Subpages]]. }}

To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.

}} }}{{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book:|nomatch= }}{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|nomatch= }}|{{fmbox|type=system|text=This page may have existed as part of the former book namespace. If so it was likely moved to [[{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|Book:|plain=False}}|^Book:|Wikipedia:Books/archive/|plain=False}}]] before being deleted. See [[Wikipedia:Books]] for more information.}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25367329899|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{New page DYM}}{{#switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text =
  • '''''Before creating an article, please read [[Help:Your first article]]. We recommend that new editors use the [[WP:Article wizard|Article wizard]].'''''
  • You can also [[Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for an existing article to which you can [[Help:redirect|redirect]] this title.
  • When creating an article, '''provide [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|references]]''' to [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable published sources]]. An article without references, especially a [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]], may be deleted.
  • You can also start your new article at [{{fullurl:Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit&preload=Template:Article_wizard/userpageskeleton&editintro=Wikipedia:Article_wizard/version1/Wizard-New_edit_instructions_userdraft}} Special:Mypage/{{PAGENAME}}]. There, you can develop the article with less risk of deletion, ask other editors to help work on it, and [[Wikipedia:Moving a page|move]] it into "[[Wikipedia:What is an article?#Namespace|article space]]" when it is ready.
}} | {{ns:User talk}} = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''No messages''' have been posted for this user yet. {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}}{{#ifeq:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}} | {{#if: {{#invoke:IPAddress|isIp|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}} | {{MediaWiki:Anontalkpagetext|caller=MediaWiki:Newarticletext}} }} }} | {{TALKSPACE}} = {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}||{{#ifexist: {{ROOTPAGENAME}}||{{Creating talk page without subject}}}}}} {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist: {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} | | Note that the corresponding {{#if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | subject page | article }} ''[[:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}]]'' also does not exist. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }}
  • To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.
}} | {{ns:File}} = {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#ifexist:Media:{{PAGENAME}} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = This media file is on [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]]—not on the English Wikipedia. Descriptions should be placed there. This page should rarely be used except to indicate [[Wikipedia:Featured pictures|featured pictures]]. Please see the [[commons:File:{{PAGENAME}}|description page on Commons]] for file information, [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks a list of pages that use this file], or the [[{{ns:Media}}:{{PAGENAME}}|direct link to this file]]. }} | {{fmbox | type = warning | id = newarticletext | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a File page with this exact title.''' Please do ''not'' manually create this page. If you wish to upload a file called ''{{PAGENAME}}'', see [[Wikipedia:Uploading images]] for instructions. If this image was recently deleted, it may still be displayed in some pages as a red link. [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}#filelinks See a list of pages that display this image.] If this file previously existed, it may have been deleted locally ([{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} local deletion log]) or on Wikimedia Commons ([https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Log&type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Commons deletion log]). }} }} | {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = Before creating this page, please see [[Wikipedia:Subpages]]. }} }} | #default = {{fmbox | type = editnotice | id = newarticletext | image = none | text = '''Wikipedia does not have a {{ #switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | Category = [[Help:Category|category]] | Help = [[Help:Contents|help page]] | Portal = [[Wikipedia:Portal|portal]] | Template = [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] | User = [[Wikipedia:User page|user page]] | Wikipedia = [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project page]] | #default = page }} with this exact title.''' {{ #ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{SUBPAGENAME}} | {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} | Category = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Category}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing categories before creating this page. | Help = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Help:Contents|existing help pages]] before creating this page. | Portal = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|existing portals]] before creating this page. | Template = To avoid redundancy, please [[Special:Search/{{ns:Template}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for existing templates before creating this page. | User = In general, this page should be created and edited by [[{{ns:User}}:{{PAGENAME}}]]. | Wikipedia = To avoid redundancy, please browse the [[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|existing policies and guidelines]] or [[Special:Search/{{ns:Project}}:{{PAGENAME}}|search]] for similar existing project pages. }} | Before creating this page, please see [[Help:Subpages]]. }}

To start a page called ''{{FULLPAGENAME}}'', type in the box below. When you are done, preview the page to check for errors and then publish it.

}} }}{{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book:|nomatch= }}{{#invoke:String|match|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|nomatch= }}|{{fmbox|type=system|text=This page may have existed as part of the former book namespace. If so it was likely moved to [[{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|^Book talk:|Book:|plain=False}}|^Book:|Wikipedia:Books/archive/|plain=False}}]] before being deleted. See [[Wikipedia:Books]] for more information.}}}}
